title: senecio papillaris
intro: Senecio papillaris, also known as the woolly groundsel, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to Australia. The medicinal properties of Senecio papillaris include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Senecio papillaris can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity if ingested in large quantities.
